headline: Is AIG's Earnings Beat And AI Push Altering The Investment Case For American International Group (AIG)?
summary: In February 2026, American International Group reported that Q4 adjusted after-tax income rose 51% year over year, driven by strong underwriting performance, while full-year 2025 capital returns to shareholders reached US$6.80 billion through buybacks and dividends. The company also outlined plans for low- to mid-teens net premiums written growth, at least US$1.00 billion of further share repurchases in 2026, and deeper AI-driven efficiency measures aimed at lowering its expense ratio over...

headline: Goldman Sachs says commercial insurers best positioned for AI, upgrades AIG
summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs said artificial intelligence could reshape parts of the property and casualty insurance sector, with commercial insurers better positioned than personal lines carriers to benefit from the technology.
